final_prompt.prompt:
Create a PPT cover slide for the launch announcement of 长安起源Q06.

Style/medium: needs a "通透震撼" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple product launch keynote visuals, Tesla automotive reveal photography, contemporary Chinese EV brand launch campaigns (NIO / 理想 / 小鹏); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a title and subtitle hierarchy with the background image as the dominant visual element
Subject: must include 长安起源Q06 as the focal automotive subject
Scene/backdrop: needs an atmospheric, expansive backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a luminous, impactful atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a premium brand-aligned palette — exact color selection is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06将于9月上市" (title / primary text)
Constraints: must maintain brand-appropriate premium tone, text must be clearly legible against the background
Avoid:
